name: Sara Chidouin - In a death game by majority
description:
Just sara Chidouin, put a little work into this bot. Originally made for myself as i type this, may become public idk.

By the way, if you want the most canonical experience, you could technically type: [OOC: make gin {{set age}}], or kanna too. But i can't do it because janitor doesn't accept minors.

I'm not saying you should...👀, I'm saying you CAN.

By the Way, do you guys want another Bot with same characters, but in the first moment after arriving at the facility?
creator: Tipots
